name: RingProgress
description: Circular determinate progress ring with optional centre label or custom content.

api.name: RingProgress
api.description: Circular determinate progress ring with optional centre label or custom content.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The progress value, clamped to 0–100. NaN is treated as 0.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Diameter of the ring in pixels (both width and height of the SVG). Default 64.

parameters.name: Thickness
parameters.description: Stroke width of the ring in pixels. Default 6.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Theme color token for the filled arc, resolved as var(--color-{Color}). Default "primary".

parameters.name: TrackColor
parameters.description: Theme color token for the unfilled track, resolved as var(--color-{TrackColor}). Default "muted".

parameters.name: ShowLabel
parameters.description: Shows the rounded percentage as centered text. Ignored when LabelContent is set.

parameters.name: LabelContent
parameters.description: Custom content rendered centered inside the ring, replacing the built-in percentage label.

parameters.name: RoundedCaps
parameters.description: Uses rounded (stroke-linecap: round) instead of squared (butt) ends on the filled arc. Default true.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer container.

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<RingProgress Value="25" ShowLabel="true" />
<RingProgress Value="50" ShowLabel="true" />
<RingProgress Value="75" ShowLabel="true" />

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<RingProgress Value="65" Size="40" ShowLabel="true" />
<RingProgress Value="65" Size="64" ShowLabel="true" />
<RingProgress Value="65" Size="96" ShowLabel="true" />

examples.title: Colors
examples.code:
<RingProgress Value="70" ShowLabel="true" Color="primary" />
<RingProgress Value="70" ShowLabel="true" Color="success" />
<RingProgress Value="70" ShowLabel="true" Color="warning" />
<RingProgress Value="70" ShowLabel="true" Color="destructive" />

mdSummary:
# RingProgress

Circular determinate progress ring with optional centre label or custom content.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/ring-progress

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| RingProgress | Value | `double` | `0` | The progress value, clamped to 0–100. NaN is treated as 0. |
| RingProgress | Size | `int` | `64` | Diameter of the ring in pixels (both width and height of the SVG). Default 64. |
| RingProgress | Thickness | `int` | `6` | Stroke width of the ring in pixels. Default 6. |
| RingProgress | Color | `string` | `"primary"` | Theme color token for the filled arc, resolved as var(--color-{Color}). Default "primary". |
| RingProgress | TrackColor | `string` | `"muted"` | Theme color token for the unfilled track, resolved as var(--color-{TrackColor}). Default "muted". |
| RingProgress | ShowLabel | `bool` | `false` | Shows the rounded percentage as centered text. Ignored when LabelContent is set. |
| RingProgress | LabelContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom content rendered centered inside the ring, replacing the built-in percentage label. |
| RingProgress | RoundedCaps | `bool` | `true` | Uses rounded (stroke-linecap: round) instead of squared (butt) ends on the filled arc. Default true. |
| RingProgress | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer container. |
| RingProgress | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer container. |

## Slots
- `LabelContent` (RingProgress) — Custom content rendered centered inside the ring, replacing the built-in percentage label.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<RingProgress />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/RingProgress/RingProgress.razor`
